kept.text:
$NTLA raised not even 1/3 of the amount of cash they need to have a reasonable runway at launch.  Only $150M of about $500M needed given their ~$100M/Q net burn.

They had to give an almost 20% discount to close just to raise that tiny chunk of cash from investors! 🤮 

That’s less than 20 weeks of burn… They’re going to have to fire up the ATM to keep diluting, or they’re going to have to take on debt.  

Not pretty.

profile_bio.description: I invest in biotechs. I often tweet about companies I have positions in.  Nothing I say should be considered investment advice.

Offering price was Grade F imo. $NTLA 

This is strike 2 I’m personally giving to the management (first was handling of Grade 4 events/mitigation in ATTR CM). 

They had 2 better options:
1) Use your ATM 
2) Wait for June conference where you can hopefully show a bit more data

$15+ should’ve been the goal here and not getting close was a big failure imo.

kept.text:
I’m come to the realization that the $NTLA shorts/bears don’t actually believe half of what they say, in fact they probably know much of what they say is incorrect.

They are simply online trolls at this point.

1. No, HAE has never had a serious liver elevation 
2. No, ATTR is actually enrolling again on both programs (has been for over a month on CM trial)
3. No, other HAE drugs did not have better data than this in blinded portion.

kept.text:
Compiling a list of every single thing bears get wrong about $NTLA so I can save hours on here.

From now on I’ll just send them the link to the post so I don’t need to interact as much with them.

Tell me what I’m missing below ⬇️ 

So far I have..
1. Comparing to Hemophilia 
2. Comparing to Casgevy
3. Saying HAE had severe liver elevations
4. Saying ATTR trials didn’t resume yet 
5. Not understanding HAE trial dynamics
6. 2” duodenal ulcers 
7. Difference between chronic liver elevations and one and done
8. Physician survey for HAE
9. HAE cost of current therapies 
10. Patient need in HAE 
11. Patient excitement for Lonvo-z
12. Speed of ATTR-CM enrollment prior to hold 
13. Comparing Nex-Z to BBIO ALNY in CM
14. Comparing Nex-Z to ALNY in PN
15. ???
